Brooklyn Bridge Park – Pier 1 – Pier 1 is, for me, one of the most beautiful spots in Brooklyn Bridge Park. The views of Manhattan and the Brooklyn Bridge are simply spectacular. The park is well maintained, green, and offers plenty of space for peaceful walks or relaxing. It’s a place where you can truly unwind and enjoy the atmosphere of New York.

You absolutely must go and enjoy the skyline that lights up as it gets dark, next to the bridge, a wonderful place. There at the pier, there is the NYW ferry, which is basically a ferry that takes you directly to Manhattan. The cost is $4.50, and the ticket can be booked on the official website. It is easy to understand, so do not worry.
This is an incredible outdoor space with singular views of both Manhattan and the Brooklyn Bridge. I thoroughly enjoyed walking around it. It was incredible.
